name: Bird of Paradise Peel & Stick Wallpaper Blue - Opalhouse™: Removable Botanical Vinyl, Repositionable, Washable
description:
Bird of Paradise Peel & Stick Wallpaper from Opalhouse™ makes it a breeze to redo your bathroom or create a striking accent wall in the living room. This vinyl wallpaper makes it easy to dress up your walls, with an adhesive back that lets you simply peel off your desired amount and attach to the wall — no need for priming or messy glue. The wallpaper has a nature-inspired look, with a pattern of mint green, white and dark green bird of paradise flowers popping against a navy backdrop. As functional as it is eye-catching, the surface of the wallpaper is both washable and stain-resistant to keep it looking its best.

This is your house. Where you create spaces as bold as your spirit. Collect objects as inspired as your dreams. Find pieces that remind you of every place you’ve been. Discover stories to inspire everywhere you have yet to go. This is Opalhouse.
